title: MP Biomedicals magGENic Plant DNA Kit: Nucleic Acid Purification
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs nucleic acid purification on up to 24 samples according to the [MP Biomedicals magGenic Plant DNA Kit](https://www.mpbio.com/us/maggenic-plant-dna-kit).
steps_raw: This protocol performs nucleic acid purification on up to 24 samples according to the [MP Biomedicals magGenic Plant DNA Kit](https://www.mpbio.com/us/maggenic-plant-dna-kit).
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
keywords: MP Biomedicals magGENic Plant DNA Kit
materials_raw: Opentrons 24 Tube Rack with Eppendorf 1.5 mL Safe-Lock Snapcap
NEST 2 mL 96-Well Deep Well Plate, V Bottom #999-00103
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
green on slot 4: starting samples (up to 24)
